title: Trump says ‘there won’t be escalation’ with Cuba
shortDescription: President Trump praised the indictment of Raúl Castro, the former president of Cuba, but added that he doesn't plan to escalate tensions.

title: Jan. 6 officers sue to block Trump's $1.8B 'slush fund'
shortDescription: Two police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, sued President Trump in a bid to block a new $1.8 billion "anti-weaponization" fund.

title: Raul Castro went from Fidel's shadow to Trump DOJ's crosshairs
shortDescription: Communist guerrilla, Bay of Pigs defender and Fidel Castro's successor, Raul Castro is now the target of a U.S. criminal indictment.

title: Trump administration indicts Raúl Castro
shortDescription: The Trump administration has indicted Raúl Castro on charges related to a 1996 shooting of a civilian plane.

title: Trump speaks at Coast Guard graduation
shortDescription: President Donald Trump speaks to the U.S. Coast Guard Academy graduates during their 145th commencement on May 20, 2026.

title: Here are the Trump-endorsed candidates who won in May 19 primaries
shortDescription: Some GOP critics were ousted by candidates backed by President Trump in the May 19 primaries.

title: Trump tells reporters he could run for Israeli PM
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he could "run for prime minister in Israel" in response to a reporter's question about Natenyahu and strikes on Iran.

title: Trump claims he would have won California if Jesus counted the votes
shortDescription: President Trump said he would have carried Democratic stronghold California "if we had Jesus Christ come down and count the votes."

title: Remembering Barney Frank's life and impact on Capitol Hill
shortDescription: Barney Frank, pioneering openly gay congressman and Dodd-Frank architect, died at 86 on May 19, 2026, after representing Massachusetts for decades.

title: Raúl Castro indicted, but Trump says no 'escalation' expected with Cuba
shortDescription: The U.S. has indicted former Cuban President Raúl Castro. The indictment is tied to the alleged downing of two civilian planes in 1996.

title: Watch President Trump give commencement speech at Coast Guard Academy
shortDescription: Watch live as President Donald Trump gives the commencement speech at the Coast Guard Academy in New London, Connecticut.

title: Trump order puts banks on alert over non-citizens
shortDescription: A Trump executive order directs banks to flag suspicious activity tied to non-citizens without requiring citizenship data collection.

title: Trump order tightens scrutiny of non-citizen banking activity
shortDescription: Trump raises scrutiny for non-US citizens on some bank accounts, directing lenders to flag tax evasion and hidden ownership.

title: Congress members call for Raúl Castro indictment
shortDescription: Members of Congress called to indict former Cuban President Raúl Castro on charges related to a 1996 shooting of two civilian planes.

title: How Pittsburgh voted in PA primary election 2026. See full results
shortDescription: Unofficial results of Pennsylvania's 2026 primary election are in. Here's how Pittsburgh residents voted.

title: Cornyn issues warning to Texas voters if Paxon wins US Senate runoff
shortDescription: Hours after Trump endorsed Ken Paxton, Sen. John Cornyn fired back, calling Paxton "an albatross" who would lose the U.S. Senate seat against a Democrat.

title: Trump endorses Ken Paxton in GOP primary runoff
shortDescription: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton said President Trump's endorsement of him gives him a "bit of momentum" in the race for the Texas Senate seat.

title: Xi Jinping welcomes Putin days after Trump meeting. See photos
shortDescription: Days after rolling out the red carpet for President Trump, Chinese leader Xi Jinping did the same for Russian President Vladimir Putin in Beijing.

title: Massie concedes election to Gallrein
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and his allies ousted Rep. Thomas Massie who served in Congress for 14 years.
